creator: Torin Redpath | Online Transformation Coach
source_text:
CHOCOLATE PROTEIN RICE CAKE BITES 🍫🔥

250 calories and 32g of protein for the WHOLE batch?! 👀

Big ups to @chef_alleyezonje for the recipe! 🙌

I try and remake viral fat loss recipes and tell you if they’re worth your time, effort and calories. If that sounds good, follow @torinredpath ✅

👨‍🍳 Ingredients (1 batch)

3 plain rice cakes (≈27g)

1 scoop @ghostlifestyle  Milk Choc Protein (use code “TORIN” for 20% off the best tasting protein in the 🌍) (≈30g)

2 tbsp cocoa powder (≈10g)

2 sachets zero-calorie sweetener (≈4g)

2 large egg whites (≈60g)

👉 Method

Preheat oven to 200°C (390°F).

Crush the rice cakes into small pieces.

Add the protein powder, cocoa powder, sweetener and egg whites.

Mix until fully combined.

Form into bite-sized clusters on a lined baking tray.

Bake for 6 minutes.

Allow to cool before serving.

📊 Calories & Macros (Whole Batch)

250 Calories

33g Protein

20g Carbs

3g Fat

—

Quick lesson 👇

Are these the best chocolate bites you’ll ever eat? No 😂

But that’s not really the point.

For 250 calories and 32g of protein for the entire batch, the macros are absolutely ridiculous.

Sometimes a fat loss recipe doesn’t need to be a 10/10 dessert… it just needs to satisfy the craving, fill you up and help you stay within your calories.

Taste? Solid. Macros? Elite. 👀🍫🔥
